steps.title: Use the margin of error
steps.content: The estimate is $31.6$ ounces and the margin of error is $0.04$ ounces. A margin of error creates an interval for the population mean, not for every individual backpack.

steps.title: Find the interval
steps.content:
Subtract and add the margin of error:
$$
31.6-0.04=31.56
$$
$$
31.6+0.04=31.64
$$
So the plausible interval for the mean is $31.56$ ounces to $31.64$ ounces.

steps.title: Choose the mean statement
steps.content: Choice A is the only statement that applies the interval to the mean weight of all backpacks made that day. The answer is A.
